name: Fanfare
description: Hands of color cards fanning open and snapping shut — every redraw deals new colors and a new spread to each fan.

code.style: --c1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --c2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --c3: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( /* one emitted spread angle keeps the fan symmetric */ --spread: @r(8, 26); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 36%; height: 64%; margin: 18% 32%; border-radius: 16% / 10%; background: var(--c2); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 16% / 10%; background: var(--c1); transform: rotate(calc(@var(--spread) * -1deg)); transform-origin: 50% 86%; transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 16% / 10%; background: var(--c3); transform: rotate(calc(@var(--spread) * 1deg)); transform-origin: 50% 86%; transition: ease 600ms; } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
